## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.8

### 🧭 Validation
- Sorts the Home Assistant integration manifest keys in the order expected by hassfest.
- Keeps the unsupported `homeassistant` key out of the integration manifest and the minimum Home Assistant version in `hacs.json`.
- Keeps the release format aligned as GitHub tag `v1.3.8` and manifest version `1.3.8`.

### 📷 Camera Motion
- Includes the camera motion mapping fixes from v1.3.6 for APK-style motion event payloads, nested event items, and top-level camera event payloads.
